---
title: "Education"
---

## PhD in Statistics  

Oregon State University — Corvallis, OR  <br>
Sept 2021 – Dec 2025 (*Defended*: Nov 2025)

Dissertation: "Copula-Based Mixture Transition Distribution Models for Forecasting Skewed and Zero-Inflated Time Series: Methodology and Comparisons with Deep Learning LSTM Networks"

Co-Advisors: Dr. Lisa Madsen, Dr. Charlotte Wickham <br> 
Committee Members: Dr. James Molyneux, Dr. Claudio Fuentes, Dr. Prasad Tadepalli

[presentation](https://franceslinyc.github.io/phd-dissertation-slides/#/copula-based-mixture-transition-distribution-models-for-forecasting-skewed-and-zero-inflated-time-series-methodology-and-comparisons-with-deep-learning-lstm-networks) [(source)](https://github.com/franceslinyc/phd-dissertation-slides) [dissertation](https://ir.library.oregonstate.edu/concern/graduate_thesis_or_dissertations/2f75rj22h) [(source)](https://github.com/franceslinyc/phd-dissertation-tsforecasting-stat-ai-2025)



## MS in Statistics 

Oregon State University — Corvallis, OR  <br>
Sept 2019 – June 2021

Master’s Project: "Prequel to Hawkes Processes: An Overview of Spatial, Temporal and Spatio-Temporal Point Processes and Some Simulations"

Advisor: Dr. James Molyneux <br> 
Committee Members: Dr. Lisa Madsen, Dr. Charlotte Wickham
